verses.text: <ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>囚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>保<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">di</rt></ruby><ruby>提<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tí</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mó</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>腓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Féi</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mén</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>妹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mèi</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>腓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">féi</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>兵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>布<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>惠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>平<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>！

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>祷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>告<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>提<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tí</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>感<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>谢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiè</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby>(<ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby>”)。

<ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>显<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>功<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>效<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shàn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">di</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>乐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>慰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>畅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuài</rt></ruby>。<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>阿<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ā</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">mǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>情<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">qínɡ</rt></ruby>

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>虽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suī</rt></ruby><ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rán</rt></ruby><ruby>靠<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kào</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>放<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>胆<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>宜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rán</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>纪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>保<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Bǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">luó</rt></ruby>，<ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>囚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>宁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>凭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>捆<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kǔn</rt></ruby><ruby>锁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>阿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ā</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mǔ</rt></ruby>(<ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>“<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>益<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chù</rt></ruby>”<ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>思<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">si</rt></ruby>)<ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>益<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>今<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīn</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>益<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>打<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>本<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">běn</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>留<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liú</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>捆<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kǔn</rt></ruby><ruby>锁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>替<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>伺<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>思<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">si</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shàn</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yú</rt></ruby><ruby>勉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>强<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yú</rt></ruby><ruby>甘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡān</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby>。
